description: Krónan is an Icelandic grocery retailer with an online SmartStore shopping platform. Its public developer-facing API supports product browsing, orders, checkout, shopping lists, recipes, addresses, delivery slots, and related account data.
summary: Krónan exposes one authenticated REST API for its SmartStore e-commerce platform and one public MCP server at `https://kronan.is/api/mcp`; no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
